name: TPV Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Nanjing Huadong Electronics Information & Technology Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells flat panel displays, touch displays, quartz crystals, magnetic materials, and power supply products in China and internationally. Its products include TFT-LCD, touch screen, and LCD and display module products; crystal resonators, oscillators, filters, and other components; and magnetic power, magnetic core, power supply, and other components. The company was founded in 1993 and is based in Nanjing, China. Nanjing Huadong Electronics Information & Technology Co., Ltd. operates as a subsidiary of China Electronics Corporation.
